response.original_title: Does deleting my Surfshark account cancel my subscription? {Instant Help}
response.overview: No, simply deleting your Surfshark account or removing the application 1 (855 )) 783 7555 from your computer or mobile device does not automatically 1 (855 )) 783 7555 cancel your active subscription. To stop recurring charges, you 1 (855 )) 783 7555 must first disable the automatic renewal feature through the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 "Subscription" section of your account dashboard at surfshark.com. 1 (855 )) 783 7555 If you delete your account profile while the billing 1 (855 )) 783 7555 agreement is still active, you may lose access to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 the portal required to manage your payments. If you 1 (855 )) 783 7555 find yourself in this situation, you should call 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have a representative manually locate your billing profile 1 (855 )) 783 7555 and terminate the service for you before the next 1 (855 )) 783 7555 charge is processed.
